validation_command: python -c "import pathlib,re; pm=pathlib.Path('Hb Track - Backend/app/core/permissions_map.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'ROLE_PERMISSIONS' in pm,'FAIL: ROLE_PERMISSIONS ausente em permissions_map.py'; roles_needed=['superadmin','treinador','atleta']; missing_roles=[r for r in roles_needed if r not in pm]; assert not missing_roles,f'FAIL: roles ausentes em ROLE_PERMISSIONS: {missing_roles}'; perm=pathlib.Path('Hb Track - Backend/app/core/permissions.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'FORBIDDEN' in perm or '403' in perm,'FAIL: guard FORBIDDEN ausente em permissions.py'; s=pathlib.Path('Hb Track - Backend/docs/ssot/schema.sql').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'ux_roles_code' in s,'FAIL: UNIQUE ux_roles_code ausente no schema'; assert 'ux_permissions_code' in s,'FAIL: UNIQUE ux_permissions_code ausente no schema'; assert pathlib.Path('Hb Track - Backend/app/models/role.py').exists(),'FAIL: app/models/role.py ausente'; assert pathlib.Path('Hb Track - Backend/app/schemas/rbac.py').exists(),'FAIL: app/schemas/rbac.py ausente'; print('PASS AR_062: RBAC hardening verificado — ROLE_PERMISSIONS OK, guards OK, schema constraints OK')"
